content.text:
[Compacted context summary; archived messages were replaced locally]

# Compacted Engineering Context

## Workspace
- Project: `C:\Users\12159\Desktop\Singularity`
- Local server: `127.0.0.1:9000` (cloud expired; use `server/server_local.py` or `server/run_local.bat`)
- Go server also at `server/server.go` (auto-admit users when CF secret empty)
- Install/vm connect localhost, not 118.25.42.70
- Identity: preserve `id.bin` starting `5673fae3` (never replace)
- Worktree dirty; `agent/input.json` runner-managed; do not edit `agent/ae.py` unless asked
- User runs `vm.exe` manually

## Architecture truths (current)

### Block layout (data → data) — DONE
- Instruction: `token_len[u32] + token[token_len] + payload_len[u32] + payload`
- End: `token_len == 0` (4 zero bytes) — NOT old zero-token[32]
- Helpers: `mods_src/block_layout.h` (`bl_ok`, `bl_instr_size`, `bl_write`, …)
- Runtime: `cont.c`, `vmstate.c` (`cvm_token`/`cvm_payload` relative to tlen), `vmexec.c` (`cvm_exec_instr`)
- Generator `instruction`/`make_block`/`collect` + install `instructions()` updated

### VM entry — no hash download middle layer — DONE
- `vm.c` main: load `first_bootstrap_block.bin` → `find(bootstrap_token)` → run
- Does **not** `download(hash)` for bootstrap
- Logical keys still resolve via vmstore override/firstchild when needed

### Stack: mark/back/slot/from — DONE (push/pop removed)
- `vmstack.c` exports only: `mark`, `back`, `slot(n)`, `from(n)`, plus size/clear/depth
- Mods: `memcpy(slot(n), &x, n)` / `*(T*)from(n)` — **no push/pop API**
- Instruction mods: `mark.c`, `back.c`; paint indents by mark/back nesting
- Full mods rebuild after push removal; 0 DLLs import push/pop

### Cond / hand-run
- `cond_token_payload`: payload `token[32]+uid[u32]+once+cont+pad`; heat on **target** node; icon-only paint
- `cond_reexec`: uid+once+cont; heat on **host** node; icon-only
- **Removed** cond link mid buttons (1x/oo) — trial run via hand
- **New** `token_run_by_hand`: payload `uid[u32]+token[32]`; process-local arm table in **vmstore** (`cvm_hand_armed/toggle/set`); not persisted across restart; link mid **ON/off**; heat on target; Ctrl+Alt insert; icon-only
- Heat fade ~2× faster (half duration)

### Editor UX
- Node header: commit / latch* / vote (tags: vote only, no latch/commit)
- No left color swatch on tokens (name color still encodes DLL/override)
- Completion + typein follow **mouse screen** coords
- Insert gap caret; soft-focus only when mouse buttons up
- **Enter** → `payload_edit_apply` (var id, cond/hand target, jump/exec target) + `tag_rename`
- Space → hash insert + tag_add_child; Tab → completion; Alt → empty var_read; Shift+Alt → var_write
- Ctrl → cond_token; Shift+Ctrl → cond_reexec; Ctrl+Alt → token_run_by_hand
- **Bugfix**: `jump_payload` must always end in cont/exec_instr (was freezing Alt/Space path)

### Views / network explorer
- Parent depth indent: `view_draw_x` / `INDENT_X=22`
- Tag/network nodes: **no link lines** between tags
- Tag header text = content string (“URL”); Enter renames via `views_tag_set_name` (resolve+rewrite cache+flush)
- Block explorer links still drawn; hand arm button on hand-run edges

### Dirty / uset / vote
- vmstore: `cvm_key_dirty`, `cvm_flush_key`, `cvm_vote`, heat APIs, hand arm APIs
- Latch (pad0 bit0) auto-flush in `views_latch_tick`
- Vote: block node→tokens; tag node→children

## Critical files
- Runtime: `vm.c`, `vmexec.c`, `vmstate.c`, `vmstack.c`, `cont.c`, `vmstore.c`
- Layout: `mods_src/block_layout.h`, block_* mods
- Editor: `generate_atomic_first_boot.py`, `install_generic_first_boot.py`
- Views: `views_common.h`, `views_paint_*.c`, `views_apply_lmb.c`, `views_tag_*.c`
- Cond/hand: `cond_token_payload.c`, `cond_reexec.c`, `token_run_by_hand.c`, `payload_edit_apply.c`
- Server: `server/server_local.py`, `server/server.go`

## Verification ops
- Native change: rebuild DLL → hash-rename `mods/<sha>.dll` → update `atomic_mod_tokens.txt`/`mod_tokens.txt` → generate → install
- Restart `vm.exe` after DLL/program/bootstrap changes
- Keep `first_bootstrap_block.bin` token matching actual `bootstrap` DLL hash on disk
- Local install: `python install_generic_first_boot.py` with server on :9000

## Exact next / open
- User must restart vm.exe after latest install (jump_payload, hand-run, heat, icon-only, no tag links)
- Confirm: Space inserts when input non-empty; Alt inserts var_read without freeze
- Confirm: Enter edits var id / cond target / hand target
- Confirm: Ctrl+Alt inserts hand-run; mid-link ON/off + heat
- Optional: true double-click title URL editor polish; drop any remaining legacy 36-byte walks in unused `views.c`/`views_render.c`
- Not requested: remove all remaining pop/push mentions in comments only

## Agent tooling
- Compaction: `compact_active_file` (`--active`) from `agent/skills/context_compaction`
